## **TZ1.3. SECTION 3 -- REGULATORY RESULT**

### **TZ1.3.1. PANSA NET GAIN/LOSS ON ACTIVITY IN THE POLAND TERMINAL CHARGING ZONE 1 IN 2025**

PANSA reported a net gain of +0.5 M€, as a combination of a loss of -0.3 M€ arising from the cost sharing mechanism, with a gain of +0.8 M€ arising from the traffic risk sharing mechanism.

### **TZ1.3.2. PANSA OVERALL REGULATORY RESULT (RR) ON ACTIVITY IN THE TERMINAL CHARING ZONE 1**

Ex-post, the overall RR, taking into account the net gain from the terminal activity mentioned above (+0.5 M€) and the actual RoE (+0.6 M€), amounts to +1.1 M€ (5.9% of the terminal revenues). The resulting ex-post rate of return on equity is 12.1%, which is higher than the 6.5% planned in the PP.

### **TZ1.3.3. NOTES**

#### **TZ1.3.3.1. NOTE 1**

#### **TZ1.3.3.2. NOTE 2**

# **TZ2. TERMINAL CHARGING ZONE - POLAND ZONE 2**
